meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: Claude Code Setup to Finish Projects Faster
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on client work. Learn how to optimize your workflow with Claude Code and Antigravity to ship production-ready apps at record speed.
content.answer_block: The bottleneck isn't your talent; it's your friction. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you move from manual boilerplate to automated execution. This setup automates repetitive coding tasks, enforces architectural standards, and keeps your project momentum high, allowing you to ship finished, high-quality deliverables weeks ahead of schedule.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: the project started with fire, but now it’s a graveyard of half-baked features and mounting technical debt. You’re staring at a half-finished dashboard, the client is pinging you for updates, and the spark of creativity has been smothered by the sheer weight of boilerplate code.

It doesn't have to be this way. The difference between a struggling freelancer and a high-earning architect is the ability to leverage AI-driven workflows. By mastering Claude Code and Antigravity, you transform from a manual laborer into a lead developer who ships, iterates, and closes projects with surgical precision.

steps.title: Initialize Environment with Precision
steps.description: Establish a robust project foundation to avoid 'blank page' syndrome. Use Antigravity to scaffold the architecture before firing up Claude.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a clean, production-ready project scaffold for a Next.js application with Tailwind CSS and TypeScript, optimized for speed and scalability.

steps.title: Contextualize the Scope
steps.description: Feed your project constraints into the AI so it doesn't hallucinate features outside your client's budget.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze these project requirements and generate a technical specification file for the AI to reference during development.

steps.title: Automate Feature Implementation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to handle the heavy lifting of backend API routes and state management.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Develop a secure authentication API route using NextAuth, following the established project patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task="Implement secure NextAuth API routes"

steps.title: Refactor for Performance
steps.description: Don't just write code; optimize it. Use the AI to identify bottlenecks before they become technical debt.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a code review on the current codebase, focusing on performance bottlenecks and potential memory leaks.

steps.title: Automated Testing & Deployment
steps.description: Ensure every line of code works before showing it to the client. Automate the test suite generation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate comprehensive unit tests for all current components to ensure 90% coverage.

pro_tips: Always define a 'system prompt' in your .clauderc file to force the AI to write clean, modular code instead of monolithic functions.
Use Antigravity to map out your database schema before starting; let Claude Code generate the Prisma or Drizzle models from that map.
Run 'claude diff' before accepting any changes to catch hidden side effects in your UI logic.
Keep your project documentation in a 'docs/' folder; Claude Code will index this and provide much more accurate, context-aware answers.
Use custom CLI aliases for your most frequent Claude Code commands to shave minutes off every development session.
content.next_steps: Once your first module is complete, document the process as a reusable template in your Antigravity library to speed up your next client project by 50%.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools to stop stalling and start scaling. Stop letting unfinished projects drain your revenue and reputation. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
